title: premna verticillata
intro: Premna verticillata, also known as the narrow leaf or verticillata, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Premna verticillata include reducing fever, relieving headache and body pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Premna verticillata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments.
